pages.text: $(bold)Birch Seed$()$(br2)Pale bark, quick growth. From the dynamic birch's leaves.
pages.title: Birch Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Dirt$() → $(italic)Birch Sapling$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
